records.question: Which customers named Selena Gerhold have Life policies that started on 2016-07-17 and ended on or after 2018-01-05?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_policies ON customers.customer_id = customer_policies.customer_id
WHERE customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Life' AND customer_policies.start_date = '2016-07-17' AND customers.customer_details = 'Selena Gerhold' AND customer_policies.end_date >= '2018-01-05'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT c.Customer_ID
FROM Customers c
JOIN Customer_Policies cp ON c.Customer_ID = cp.Customer_ID
WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Selena Gerhold'
AND cp.Policy_Type_Code = 'Life'
AND cp.Start_Date = '2016-07-17'
AND cp.End_Date >= '2018-01-05'

records.question: Which customers named Dayana Robel have travel policies that started on or before 2018-06-16 and ended on or before 2017-12-04?

SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers

WHERE customer_policies.start_date <= '2018-06-16' AND customer_policies.policy_type_code = 'Travel' AND customers.customer_details = 'Dayana Robel' AND customer_policies.end_date <= '2017-12-04'

FROM Customers c

WHERE c.Customer_Details = 'Dayana Robel'
AND cp.Policy_Type_Code LIKE 'TRAVEL%'
AND cp.Start_Date <= '2018-06-16'
AND cp.End_Date <= '2017-12-04'
